tree.text: The most meaningful housework I have done
tree.translation: 我做过的最有意义的家务事

children.text: Yesterday, I cleaned up the living room.
I sorted the rubbish and put it outside.
children.translation: 我整理了垃圾并放到了外面。

children.text: Then, I helped my parents hang up some posters and decorate my bedroom.
children.translation: 然后，我帮父母挂起了一些海报并装饰了我的卧室。

children.text: First, it makes our home clean and comfortable.
children.translation: 第一，它使我们的家变得干净和舒适。

children.text: Second, it can help my busy parents.
children.translation: 第二，它能帮到我忙碌的父母。

children.text: Last, it brings me great joy.
children.translation: 最后，它给我带来了巨大的喜悦。

tree.text: The most meaningful housework I have done
tree.translation: 我做过的最有意义的家务事

children.text: To begin with, I cleaned up the messy living room and sorted all the rubbish carefully.
children.translation: 首先，我清扫了凌乱的客厅并仔细地整理了所有垃圾。
children.highlight: To begin with, cleaned up, living room, sorted, rubbish

children.text: After that, I hung up several beautiful posters to decorate my own bedroom.
children.translation: 在那之后，我挂起了几张漂亮的海报来装饰我自己的卧室。
children.highlight: After that, hung up, several, decorate, bedroom

children.text: First of all, doing this makes our living environment clean and comfortable.
children.translation: 首先，这样做使我们的居住环境变得干净和舒适。

children.text: Besides, it can share the chores with my busy parents so they can relax.
children.translation: 此外，这可以和忙碌的父母分担家务，让他们得以放松。

children.text: Most importantly, it gives me a sense of responsibility and brings me great joy.
children.translation: 最重要的是，它给了我一种责任感并带给我巨大的乐趣。
